diagrams.name: service_provider_bootstrap
diagrams.title: AI Service Provider Bootstrap
diagrams.description: AiServiceProvider registration, command binding, and publishing during Laravel boot
diagrams.scope: Service provider and container registration lifecycle

diagrams.name: ai_manager_provider_resolution
diagrams.title: AI Manager Provider Resolution
diagrams.description: AiManager resolving provider instances (text, audio, image, embedding, reranking, transcription, file, store) with faking support

diagrams.name: agent_execution_loop
diagrams.title: Agent Execution Loop
diagrams.description: agent() helper → AnonymousAgent construction → instruction/message/tool setup → iterative LLM call loop → final response

diagrams.name: agent_middleware_pipeline
diagrams.title: Agent Middleware Pipeline
diagrams.description: Middleware stack processing before/after agent dispatch, including short-circuiting and passthrough

diagrams.name: pipeline_execution
diagrams.title: Pipeline Execution
diagrams.description: pipeline() helper orchestrating sequential processing stages with data flowing through each stage

diagrams.name: text_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Text Generation Flow
diagrams.description: TextProvider gateway request construction, message mapping, tool attachment, API call, and response parsing

diagrams.name: text_streaming_flow
diagrams.title: Text Streaming Flow
diagrams.description: Streaming text generation via SSE parsing, stream event emission (TextStart, TextDelta, TextEnd, ReasoningDelta), and Vercel protocol output

diagrams.name: tool_invocation_loop
diagrams.title: Tool Invocation & Tool Call Loop
diagrams.description: LLM returning tool calls, InvokesTools dispatching each ToolCall, collecting ToolResults, re-submitting to LLM, loop until no more tool calls
diagrams.scope: Tool call dispatch and result collection cycle

diagrams.name: schema_structured_output
diagrams.title: Schema-Based Structured Output
diagrams.description: ComposesSchemaInstructions transforming JSON schema into provider instructions, generating structured output, and validating the response

diagrams.name: provider_failover_handling
diagrams.title: Provider Failover Handling
diagrams.description: Detecting provider errors via HandlesFailoverErrors, emitting ProviderFailedOver event, and retrying with a fallback provider
diagrams.scope: Provider error detection and failover switching

diagrams.name: embedding_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Embedding Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Embeddings.for() → EmbeddingProvider gateway dispatch → GeneratingEmbeddings event → vector response collection, with fake/assert support

diagrams.name: reranking_flow
diagrams.title: Reranking Flow
diagrams.description: RerankingProvider receiving query + documents → gateway reranking call → RankedDocument results returned

diagrams.name: image_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Image Generation Flow
diagrams.description: ImageProvider dispatching image generation request to gateway (OpenAI, XAI), handling response into GeneratedImage

diagrams.name: audio_and_transcription_flow
diagrams.title: Audio Generation & Transcription Flow
diagrams.description: AudioProvider generating speech via ElevenLabsGateway → AudioGenerated event; TranscriptionProvider transcribing audio into TranscriptionSegments
diagrams.scope: Audio synthesis and speech transcription pipelines

diagrams.name: file_management_flow
diagrams.title: File Upload & Management Flow
diagrams.description: Files.put/putFromPath/putFromStorage uploading files to provider, CanBeUploadedToProvider/CanBeRetrievedOrDeletedFromProvider trait lifecycle, and Files.delete
diagrams.scope: File upload, retrieval, and deletion lifecycle

diagrams.name: vector_store_management_flow
diagrams.title: Vector Store Management Flow
diagrams.description: Stores.create/get/delete → StoreProvider gateway → Store.add (PreparesStorableFiles) → Store.remove/refresh → StoreFileCounts tracking
diagrams.scope: Vector store lifecycle and document management

diagrams.name: provider_tool_execution
diagrams.title: Provider Tool Execution (FileSearch / WebSearch / WebFetch)
diagrams.description: ProviderTool resolution (FileSearch, WebSearch, WebFetch) dispatch during agent loop, result citation handling, and UrlCitation extraction
diagrams.scope: Native provider tool invocation within the agent loop

diagrams.name: conversation_memory_flow
diagrams.title: Conversation Memory & History Flow
diagrams.description: RemembersConversations trait storing/loading message history, queued response callbacks via HasQueuedResponseCallbacks and InvokesQueuedResponseCallbacks
diagrams.scope: Conversation state persistence and queued callback execution
